products.title: LORO PIANA Week End Walk 'Sauge Ancien'
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) Sneakers made from Wind microfiber. They are waterproof and wind-resistant, thanks to a Storm System® treatment. Their contoured silhouette is defined by suede details and center lacing. Iconic topstitching and light padding provide comfort and high performance, while the ultra-lightweight soles are trimmed with cleats for a sporty allure.

products.title: LORO PIANA Week-End Walk Sneakers "White"
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) Sneakers made from a three-dimensional technical knit, featuring a contoured silhouette that tapers at the centre. Attractive, functional, Napa-leather details provide comfort and high performance, while the ultra-lightweight soles are trimmed with cleats for a sporty allure.

products.title: Loro Piana 360 Lp Flexy Walk Sneaker 'Black'
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) Sneaker in double-layer knitted Wish wool crafted with a very exclusive construction technique. Ultra-light and supremely comfortable, they are ideal for leisure time and relaxing.

products.title: LORO PIANA  Suede Modular Walk  'Blue'
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) Loro Piana’s Modular Walk Sneakers tap into modern sports-luxe style codes while upholding the brand’s commitment to impeccable Italian craftsmanship. With panels of sumptuous suede to the upper and a cushioned rubber sole, the sleek, streamlined pair are secured with a comfortable lace-up fastening.

products.title: LORO PIANA Wool sock sneakers

products.title: LORO PIANA Week End Walk 'Black'
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) Loro Piana's Italian-made 'Weekend Walk' sneakers have durable shell and suede uppers that are waterproof and wind-resistant, thanks to the label's Storm System® treatment. Lightly padded for comfort, they feature signature topstitching, debossed logos and lightweight, cleat-inspired rubber soles.
